# Ceq

Compact LLM context index for this repository.

## Read first

- `AGENTS.md` — canonical agent operating instructions.
- `README.md` — human/product overview when present.
- `ECOSYSTEM.md` — MADFAM ecosystem and Enclii deployment context when present.
- `docs/CEQ_STABILITY_ROADMAP.md` — stabilization phases, smoke matrix, remaining gates.
- `docs/GA_DEMO_DEFINITION.md` — capped GA demo definition, readiness scorecard, Tier A/B/C.
- `docs/JANUA_OPERATOR.md` — Janua OAuth registration checklist (Phase 0 operator gate).
- `docs/JANUA_AGENT_HANDOFF.md` — complete cross-repo handoff for Janua-side agents.
- `llms-full.txt` — full context map and durable operating contract.

## Testing and CI gates

- Studio unit tests: `pnpm --filter @ceq/studio test`
- Studio Playwright auth E2E: `pnpm --filter @ceq/studio test:e2e` (mock Janua server)
- Studio Docker smoke: `scripts/studio-docker-smoke.sh <image>`
- Public production smoke: `CEQ_PUBLIC_ONLY=true scripts/production-smoke.sh`
- CI jobs: `Studio · Docker smoke`, `Studio · Playwright auth` (see `.github/workflows/ci.yaml`)

## Production operations

Routine production operations are Enclii-first. Use Enclii web, API, or CLI
before raw infrastructure tools. Direct `kubectl`, `helm`, SSH, provider CLIs,
`docker exec`, or direct container access is bootstrap/break-glass only.
